nasb.text: Just as a father has compassion on his children, So the Lord has compassion on those who fear Him.

esv.text: As a father shows compassion to his children, so the Lord shows compassion to those who fear him.

cnv.text: 父親怎樣憐恤兒子， 耶和華也照樣憐恤敬畏他的人；

ccb.text: 耶和华怜爱敬畏祂的人， 如同慈父怜爱自己的儿女。

csbs.text: 父亲怎样怜悯自己的儿女， 耶和华也怎样怜悯敬畏他的人；
